title: Implement Wave 39 manager dashboard pending actions contract
description: Add a manager-authenticated pending-actions dashboard endpoint that aggregates pending handoff and contract follow-up items with additive metadata while preserving current dashboard consumers.
acceptance_criteria: A manager-safe pending-actions endpoint returns additive handoff and contract follow-up items
Response payload includes stable item type, target id, status summary, and deep-link hint metadata
Existing dashboard endpoints continue to work unchanged when the new endpoint is ignored
